title: spergula rubra subsp. oreophila
intro: Spergula rubra subsp. oreophila, also known as Alpine Spurrey, is a subalpine plant species within the family Caryophyllaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine Spurrey include reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Alpine Spurrey can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
